title: Lazy Ginger Paleo Bowl
description: A salty and velvety Filipino dish featuring ground ginger in a lazy Sunday style, perfectly suitable for paleo eaters.

ingredients.name: 1 can of drained white beans
ingredients.notes: Dried white beans can be used instead, soaking overnight and cooking until tender.

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, sautéing for about 1 minute until fragrant but not browned.
Push the aromatics to one side of the pan and add the drained white beans. Sprinkle with salt and cayenne pepper.
Stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes until the white beans are heated through and starting to absorb some of the bean sauté.
Serve hot over a bed of paleo-friendly greens or cauliflower rice as desired.
